prompt: Use ls on widget/data and widget/testdata. Then read widget/data/info.txt and widget/testdata/fixture.txt and tell me exactly what each file says. Do not inspect any other directories or files, and do not run tests.

expected.text: Use ls on widget/data and widget/testdata. Then read widget/data/info.txt and widget/testdata/fixture.txt and tell me exactly what each file says. Do not inspect any other directories or files, and do not run tests.

expected.content: I’ll list those two directories and read only the two requested files.

result.output:

</file>

<file name="widget/testdata/fixture.txt" line-count="1" byte-count="24" any-line-truncated="false" file-truncated="false">

</file>

expected.content:
I inspected only `widget/data`, `widget/testdata`, `widget/data/info.txt`, and `widget/testdata/fixture.txt`.

- `widget/testdata/fixture.txt`: `testdata file says beta`
